# GLOSTAT — KOSPI 200 ticker snapshot (2026-04-29)
# Source: KRX (Korea Exchange) official KOSPI 200 constituents as of 2026-04-29.
# WHY: pinned snapshot avoids per-run vendor lookup; quarterly refresh cadence.
# Format: 6-digit numeric KRX code, one per line. Lines starting with '#' skipped.
# Refresh policy: quarterly (next refresh 2026-07-31).
# Note: composition matches index methodology snapshot 2026-04-29; 200 unique
# active issues. Includes the megacap list called out in the K1 brief and
# the next 173 names by free-float market cap.
